purpose: Read-only metadata view for a swarm task (the top-level swarm record from initialization.json — distinct from per-agent details). Renders task name as custom header, badges row (overall_status, type, project, directory), a long-form prompt block, and a meta grid (Created, Started, Completed, Total Tasks, Completed Tasks, Failed Tasks, Waves). Has no edit affordances — purely informational; opened from HomeView/StatsBar/swarm header to inspect a swarm's plan summary.
gotchas: metaItem returns null when value is null/undefined OR empty string — a value of 0 (e.g. failed_tasks=0) WILL be rendered because String(0) is truthy and the != null check passes; consistent with intent but tricky if intent is to hide zero-counts.
Inline StatusBadge sub-component duplicates the one in AgentDetails.jsx — they share visual style but are NOT extracted.
Modal title is empty string ('') because TaskDetails renders its own .task-details-header — same convention as AgentDetails.
There is no way to refresh — task object is captured at modal-open time; if the swarm completes while modal is open, badges will show stale data.
patterns: Header comment 'Mirrors TaskDetailsModal.js' — JSX rewrite of vanilla.
Custom header inside body rather than using Modal title — gives more typographic control.
conventions: Class names: .task-details-* prefix shared with AgentDetails (both use .task-details-meta, .task-details-badges, .task-details-prompt — visual consistency).
